Exception if there is another comment explaining the exception below[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 05:34, 17 March 2025 (UTC)}} '''三河国の式内社一覧'''（みかわのくにのしきないしゃいちらん）は、『[[Engishiki]]』第9巻・第10巻「神名帳上下」（[[延喜式神名帳]]）に記載のある[[神社]]、いわゆる「[[式内社]]」およびその[[論社]]のうち、[[三河国]]に分類されている神社の一覧。 また『延喜式』神名帳の編纂当時に存在したが同帳に記載の無い神社、いわゆる「[[式外社]]」についても付記する。 == 式内社 == {{節stub}} 『延喜式』神名帳では、小社26座25社を記載。 {{List of Shikinai Shrines/Legend}} {| class="wikitable" style="background:#ffffff; font-size:85%" ! style="background:#a0f0a0" colspan=4 | {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳}} ! style="background:#a0f0a0" colspan=3 | Designated Shrines ! style="background:#a0f0a0" rowspan=2 | Compilation |- style="white-space:nowrap;" ! style="background:#a0f0a0; padding-right:2.6em; padding-left:2.6em;" | Shrine Name ! style="background:#a0f0a0; padding-right:2.1em; padding-left:2.1em;" | Reading ! style="background:#a0f0a0; padding-right:2.1em; padding-left:2.1em;" | Rank ! style="background:#a0f0a0;" | Note ! style="background:#a0f0a0; padding-right:2.6em; padding-left:2.6em;" | Shrine Name ! style="background:#a0f0a0; padding-right:2.1em; padding-left:2.1em;" | Location ! style="background:#a0f0a0; padding-right:2.3em; padding-left:2.3em;" | Remarks |- |colspan=8 style="background-color:#ccffcc;"|'''[[加茂郡 (三河国)|賀茂郡]]''' 7座（並小） |- |'''野見神社'''||nomino||Shikinai Shosha||||野見神社||愛知県[[豊田市]]野見山町|||| |- |'''野神社'''||||Shikinai Shosha||||野神社||愛知県[[豊田市]]野口町水別日面|||| |- |'''兵主神社'''||||Shikinai Shosha||||兵主神社||愛知県[[豊田市]]荒井町松島|||| |- |'''射穂神社'''||ihono||Shikinai Shosha||||射穂神社||愛知県[[豊田市]]保見町北山|||| |- |'''狭投神社'''||sanaゲ||Shikinai Shosha||||[[猿投神社]]||[[愛知県]][[豊田市]]猿投町||三河国三宮{{Sfn|中世諸国一宮制|2000th year |p=127}}||[http://21coe.kokugakuin.ac.jp/db/jinja/100401.html] |- |'''広沢神社'''||hirosahano||Shikinai Shosha||||広沢天神社||愛知県豊田市猿投町小黒見|||| |- |'''灰宝神社'''||hahiho||Shikinai Shosha||||灰宝神社||愛知県豊田市越戸町松葉|||| |- |colspan=8 style="background-color:#ccffcc;"|'''[[額田郡]]''' 2座（並小） |- |'''稲前神社'''||inasakino

{{afc comment|1=Used substitition to get all the templates into here relatively easily. On enwiki if you want the templates extract them out of this page to make templates, The jawiki system is too hard[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 05:35, 31 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=page target for move is at List of Shikinaisha in Mikawa Province[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:49, 26 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=page target for move is at [[List of Shikinaisha in Mikawa Province]] - [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:48, 26 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=page target for move is at List of Shikinaisha in Mikawa Province[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:48, 26 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=Switching over to deprecating the templates. So things might be a bit unexpected.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 05:01, 18 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=If this is in the format "List of Shikinaisha in X" then I have linked all existing shrines into the table. Otherwise I have not. Translation of the texts will come later as it is a lot less difficult than the tables. Exception if there is another comment explaining the exception below[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 05:34, 17 March 2025 (UTC)}} '''三河国の式内社一覧'''（みかわのくにのしきないしゃいちらん）は、『[[Engishiki]]』第9巻・第10巻「神名帳上下」（[[延喜式神名帳]]）に記載のある[[神社]]、いわゆる「[[式内社]]」およびその[[論社]]のうち、[[三河国]]に分類されている神社の一覧。 また『延喜式』神名帳の編纂当時に存在したが同帳に記載の無い神社、いわゆる「[[式外社]]」についても付記する。 == 式内社 == {{節stub}} 『延喜式』神名帳では、小社26座25社を記載。 {{List of Shikinai Shrines/Legend}} {| class="wikitable" style="background:#ffffff; font-size:85%" ! style="background:#a0f0a0" colspan=4 | {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳}} ! style="background:#a0f0a0" colspan=3 | Designated Shrines ! style="background:#a0f0a0" rowspan=2 | Compilation |- style="white-space:nowrap;" ! style="background:#a0f0a0; padding-right:2.6em; padding-left:2.6em;" | Shrine Name ! style="background:#a0f0a0; padding-right:2.1em; padding-left:2.1em;" | Reading ! style="background:#a0f0a0; padding-right:2.1em; padding-left:2.1em;" | Rank ! style="background:#a0f0a0;" | Note ! style="background:#a0f0a0; padding-right:2.6em; padding-left:2.6em;" | Shrine Name ! style="background:#a0f0a0; padding-right:2.1em; padding-left:2.1em;" | Location ! style="background:#a0f0a0; padding-right:2.3em; padding-left:2.3em;" | Remarks |- |colspan=8 style="background-color:#ccffcc;"|'''[[加茂郡 (三河国)|賀茂郡]]''' 7座（並小） |- |'''野見神社'''||nomino||Shikinai Shosha||||野見神社||愛知県[[豊田市]]野見山町|||| |- |'''野神社'''||||Shikinai Shosha||||野神社||愛知県[[豊田市]]野口町水別日面|||| |- |'''兵主神社'''||||Shikinai Shosha||||兵主神社||愛知県[[豊田市]]荒井町松島|||| |- |'''射穂神社'''||ihono||Shikinai Shosha||||射穂神社||愛知県[[豊田市]]保見町北山|||| |- |'''狭投神社'''||sanaゲ||Shikinai Shosha||||[[猿投神社]]||[[愛知県]][[豊田市]]猿投町||三河国三宮{{Sfn|中世諸国一宮制|2000th year |p=127}}||[http://21coe.kokugakuin.ac.jp/db/jinja/100401.html] |- |'''広沢神社'''||hirosahano||Shikinai Shosha||||広沢天神社||愛知県豊田市猿投町小黒見|||| |- |'''灰宝神社'''||hahiho||Shikinai Shosha||||灰宝神社||愛知県豊田市越戸町松葉|||| |- |colspan=8 style="background-color:#ccffcc;"|'''[[額田郡]]''' 2座（並小） |- |'''稲前神社'''||inasakino
inakuma||Shikinai Shosha||||[[稲前神社]]||愛知県[[岡崎市]][[稲熊町]]|||| |- |'''謁播神社'''||achihano
ehata||Shikinai Shosha||||[[謁播神社]]||愛知県岡崎市[[東阿知和町]]|||| |- |colspan=8 style="background-color:#ccffcc;"|'''[[碧海郡]]''' 6座（並小） |- |rowspan=2|'''和志取神社'''||rowspan=2|washitorino||rowspan=2|Shikinai Shosha||rowspan=2| ||[[和志取神社 (岡崎市)|和志取神社]]||愛知県岡崎市西本郷町||||rowspan=2| |- |（{{ill|candidate shrines|ja|論社|lt=candidate}}）和志取神社||愛知県[[安城市]]柿碕町|| |- |'''酒人神社'''||sakamutono||Shikinai Shosha||||酒人神社||愛知県[[岡崎市]]島坂町酒人木no元|||| |- |'''日長神社'''||hinakano||Shikinai Shosha||||日名神明宮||愛知県[[岡崎市]]日名町|||| |- |'''知立神社'''||chiriuno
-rifu||Shikinai Shosha||||[[知立神社]]||愛知県[[知立市]]西町||三河国二宮{{Sfn|中世諸国一宮制|2000th year |p=125}}||[http://21coe.kokugakuin.ac.jp/db/jinja/100201.html] |- |'''比蘇神社'''||hisono||Shikinai Shosha||||比蘇天神社||愛知県岡崎市宮地町字北浦|||| |- |'''糟目神社'''||kasumeno||Shikinai Shosha||||[[糟目犬頭神社]]||愛知県岡崎市宮地町|||| |- |colspan=8 style="background-color:#ccffcc;"|'''[[幡豆郡|播豆郡]]''' 3座（並小） |- |'''久麻久神社 二座'''||kumakuno||Shikinai Shosha||||[[久麻久神社]] ||愛知県[[西尾市]]八tsu面町麓|||| |- |'''羽豆神社'''||hatsuno||Shikinai Shosha||||[[幡頭神社]]||愛知県[[西尾市]]吉良町宮崎|||| |- |colspan=8 style="background-color:#ccffcc;"|'''[[宝飯郡|宝飫郡]]''' 6座（並小） |- |'''形原神社'''||kataharano||Shikinai Shosha||||[[形原神社]]||[[愛知県]][[蒲郡市]]形原町|||| |- |'''御津神社'''||mitsuno||Shikinai Shosha||||[[御津神社]]||[[愛知県]][[豊川市]]御津町|||| |- |'''兔足神社'''
（菟足神社）||utarino||Shikinai Shosha||||[[菟足神社]]||愛知県[[豊川市]]小坂井町|||| |- |'''砥鹿神社'''||tokano||Shikinai Shosha||||[[Toga Shrine]]||愛知県豊川市一宮町||三河国[[一宮]]{{Sfn|中世諸国一宮制|2000th year |p=124}}||[http://21coe.kokugakuin.ac.jp/db/jinja/100101.html] |- |'''赤日子神社'''||akahikono||Shikinai Shosha||||[[赤日子神社]]||[[愛知県]][[蒲郡市]]神no郷町|||| |- |'''石座神社'''||ihakurano||Shikinai Shosha||||[[石座神社]]||[[愛知県]][[新城市]]大宮字狐塚|||| |- |colspan=8 style="background-color:#ccffcc;"|'''[[八名郡]]''' 1座（小） |- |'''石巻神社'''||ishimakino||Shikinai Shosha||||[[石巻神社]]||愛知県[[豊橋市]]石巻町|||| |- |colspan=8 style="background-color:#ccffcc;"|'''[[渥美郡]]''' 1座（小） |- |'''阿志神社'''||ashino||Shikinai Shosha||||[[阿志神社]]||愛知県[[田原市]]芦町|||| |} == 式外社 == {{節stub}} 『延喜式』神名帳の編纂当時に存在したが、同帳に記載の無い神社。 == References == {{脚注heruプ}} {{reflist}} == 参考文献 == * 皇典講究所・全国神職会校訂[{{NDLDC|1442211/160}} 『延喜式 上巻』]（大岡山書店、昭和4th year ） - 国立国会図書館デジtarukorekushiョn * [{{NDLDC|1273537/37}} 『延喜式 第2』]（日本古典全集刊行会、昭和4th year ） - 国立国会図書館デジtarukorekushiョn * {{Cite book|和書|editor=中世諸国一宮制研究会編|author=|year=2000|chapter=|title=中世諸国一宮制の基礎的研究|publisher=岩田書院|isbn=978-4872941708|ref={{Harvid|中世諸国一宮制|2000th year }}}} == 外部rinku == * [http://21coe.kokugakuin.ac.jp/db/jinja/jinjastate10.html 参河国 式内社26座] - 國學院大學21世紀COEプroグramu「神道・神社史料集成」 {{式内社一覧}} {{citation needed|みかわのくにのしきないしやいちらん}} {{citation needed|三河国のList of Shikinai Shrines}} {{citation needed|三河国のList of Shikinai Shrines}}{{citation needed|三河国のList of Shikinai Shrines}} {{citation needed|三河国のList of Shikinai Shrines}} {{citation needed|List of Shikinaisha in Mikawa Province}} {{citation needed|List of Shikinaisha in Mikawa Province}} {{citation needed|List of Shikinaisha in List of Shikinaisha in Mikawa Province}} {{citation needed|Lists of Shikinaisha List of Shikinaisha in Mikawa Province}} {{citation needed|List of Shikinaisha in List of Shikinaisha in Mikawa Province}} {{citation needed|List of Shikinaisha in Mikawa Province}} {{draft categories| [[Category:to be resorted]] [[Category:11]] [[Category:erroneous transclusions of 三河国の式内社一覧]] [[Category:三河国の式内社|*]] [[Category:Lists of Shikinaisha by location]] [[Category:Pages to be translated]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:List of Shikinai Shrines]] [[Category:Shikinai Shrine replacements]] [[Category:New]] }} [[sn:List of Shikinaisha in Mikawa Province]] [[sn:三河国のList of Shikinai Shrines]] [[ja:三河国の式内社一覧]] [[sn:三河国の式内社一覧]] {{DEFAULTSORT:List of Shikinaisha in Mikawa Province}}

So things might be a bit unexpected.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 05:01, 18 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=If this is in the format "List of Shikinaisha in X" then I have linked all existing shrines into the table. Otherwise I have not. Translation of the texts will come later as it is a lot less difficult than the tables. Exception if there is another comment explaining the exception below[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 05:34, 17 March 2025 (UTC)}} '''三河国の式内社一覧'''（みかわのくにのしきないしゃいちらん）は、『[[Engishiki]]』第9巻・第10巻「神名帳上下」（[[延喜式神名帳]]）に記載のある[[神社]]、いわゆる「[[式内社]]」およびその[[論社]]のうち、[[三河国]]に分類されている神社の一覧。 また『延喜式』神名帳の編纂当時に存在したが同帳に記載の無い神社、いわゆる「[[式外社]]」についても付記する。 == 式内社 == {{節stub}} 『延喜式』神名帳では、小社26座25社を記載。 {{List of Shikinai Shrines/Legend}} {| class="wikitable" style="background:#ffffff; font-size:85%" ! style="background:#a0f0a0" colspan=4 | {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|12=draft}} ! style="background:#a0f0a0" colspan=3 | Designated Shrines ! style="background:#a0f0a0" rowspan=2 | Compilation |- style="white-space:nowrap;" ! style="background:#a0f0a0; padding-right:2.6em; padding-left:2.6em;" | Shrine Name ! style="background:#a0f0a0; padding-right:2.1em; padding-left:2.1em;" | Reading ! style="background:#a0f0a0; padding-right:2.1em; padding-left:2.1em;" | Rank ! style="background:#a0f0a0;" | Note ! style="background:#a0f0a0; padding-right:2.6em; padding-left:2.6em;" | Shrine Name ! style="background:#a0f0a0; padding-right:2.1em; padding-left:2.1em;" | Location ! style="background:#a0f0a0; padding-right:2.3em; padding-left:2.3em;" | Remarks |- |colspan=8 style="background-color:#ccffcc;"|'''[[加茂郡 (三河国)|賀茂郡]]''' 7座（並小） |- |'''野見神社'''||nomino||Shikinai Shosha||||野見神社||愛知県[[豊田市]]野見山町|||| |- |'''野神社'''||||Shikinai Shosha||||野神社||愛知県[[豊田市]]野口町水別日面|||| |- |'''兵主神社'''||||Shikinai Shosha||||兵主神社||愛知県[[豊田市]]荒井町松島|||| |- |'''射穂神社'''||ihono||Shikinai Shosha||||射穂神社||愛知県[[豊田市]]保見町北山|||| |- |'''狭投神社'''||sanaゲ||Shikinai Shosha||||[[猿投神社]]||[[愛知県]][[豊田市]]猿投町||三河国三宮{{Sfn|中世諸国一宮制|2000th year |p=127}}||[http://21coe.kokugakuin.ac.jp/db/jinja/100401.html] |- |'''広沢神社'''||hirosahano||Shikinai Shosha||||広沢天神社||愛知県豊田市猿投町小黒見|||| |- |'''灰宝神社'''||hahiho||Shikinai Shosha||||灰宝神社||愛知県豊田市越戸町松葉|||| |- |colspan=8 style="background-color:#ccffcc;"|'''[[額田郡]]''' 2座（並小） |- |'''稲前神社'''||inasakino
inakuma||Shikinai Shosha||||[[稲前神社]]||愛知県[[岡崎市]][[稲熊町]]|||| |- |'''謁播神社'''||achihano

{{afc comment|1=Used substitition to get all the templates into here relatively easily. On enwiki if you want the templates extract them out of this page to make templates, The jawiki system is too hard[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 05:35, 31 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=page target for move is at List of Shikinaisha in Mikawa Province[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:49, 26 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=page target for move is at [[List of Shikinaisha in Mikawa Province]] - [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:48, 26 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=page target for move is at List of Shikinaisha in Mikawa Province[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:48, 26 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=Switching over to deprecating the templates. So things might be a bit unexpected.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 05:01, 18 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=If this is in the format "List of Shikinaisha in X" then I have linked all existing shrines into the table. Otherwise I have not. Translation of the texts will come later as it is a lot less difficult than the tables. Exception if there is another comment explaining the exception below[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 05:34, 17 March 2025 (UTC)}} '''三河国の式内社一覧'''（みかわのくにのしきないしゃいちらん）は、『[[Engishiki]]』第9巻・第10巻「神名帳上下」（[[延喜式神名帳]]）に記載のある[[神社]]、いわゆる「[[式内社]]」およびその[[論社]]のうち、[[三河国]]に分類されている神社の一覧。 また『延喜式』神名帳の編纂当時に存在したが同帳に記載の無い神社、いわゆる「[[式外社]]」についても付記する。 == 式内社 == {{節stub}} 『延喜式』神名帳では、小社26座25社を記載。 {{List of Shikinai Shrines/Legend}} {| class="wikitable" style="background:#ffffff; font-size:85%" ! {{afc comment|1=Used substitition to get all the templates into here relatively easily. On enwiki if you want the templates extract them out of this page to make templates, The jawiki system is too hard[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 05:35, 31 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=page target for move is at List of Shikinaisha in Mikawa Province[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:49, 26 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=page target for move is at [[List of Shikinaisha in Mikawa Province]] - [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:48, 26 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=page target for move is at List of Shikinaisha in Mikawa Province[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:48, 26 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=Switching over to deprecating the templates. So things might be a bit unexpected.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 05:01, 18 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=If this is in the format "List of Shikinaisha in X" then I have linked all existing shrines into the table. Otherwise I have not. Translation of the texts will come later as it is a lot less difficult than the tables. Exception if there is another comment explaining the exception below[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 05:34, 17 March 2025 (UTC)}} '''三河国の式内社一覧'''（みかわのくにのしきないしゃいちらん）は、『[[Engishiki]]』第9巻・第10巻「神名帳上下」（[[延喜式神名帳]]）に記載のある[[神社]]、いわゆる「[[式内社]]」およびその[[論社]]のうち、[[三河国]]に分類されている神社の一覧。 また『延喜式』神名帳の編纂当時に存在したが同帳に記載の無い神社、いわゆる「[[式外社]]」についても付記する。 == 式内社 == {{節stub}} 『延喜式』神名帳では、小社26座25社を記載。 {{List of Shikinai Shrines/Legend}} {| class="wikitable" style="background:#ffffff; font-size:85%" ! Otherwise I have not. Translation of the texts will come later as it is a lot less difficult than the tables. Otherwise I have not. Translation of the texts will come later as it is a lot less difficult than the tables. {{afc comment|1=Used substitition to get all the templates into here relatively easily. On enwiki if you want the templates extract them out of this page to make templates, The jawiki system is too hard[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 05:35, 31 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=page target for move is at List of Shikinaisha in Mikawa Province[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:49, 26 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=page target for move is at [[List of Shikinaisha in Mikawa Province]] - [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:48, 26 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=page target for move is at List of Shikinaisha in Mikawa Province[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:48, 26 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=Switching over to deprecating the templates. Otherwise I have not. Translation of the texts will come later as it is a lot less difficult than the tables. {{afc comment|1=Used substitition to get all the templates into here relatively easily. On enwiki if you want the templates extract them out of this page to make templates, The jawiki system is too hard[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 05:35, 31 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=page target for move is at List of Shikinaisha in Mikawa Province[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:49, 26 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=page target for move is at [[List of Shikinaisha in Mikawa Province]] - [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:48, 26 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=page target for move is at List of Shikinaisha in Mikawa Province[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:48, 26 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=Switching over to deprecating the templates. So things might be a bit unexpected.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 05:01, 18 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=If this is in the format "List of Shikinaisha in X" then I have linked all existing shrines into the table. Otherwise I have not. Translation of the texts will come later as it is a lot less difficult than the tables. revision.text:
{{afc comment|1=Used substitition to get all the templates into here relatively easily. On enwiki if you want the templates extract them out of this page to make templates, The jawiki system is too hard[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 05:35, 31 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=page target for move is at List of Shikinaisha in Mikawa Province[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:49, 26 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=page target for move is at [[List of Shikinaisha in Mikawa Province]] - [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:48, 26 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=page target for move is at List of Shikinaisha in Mikawa Province[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:48, 26 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=Switching over to deprecating the templates. So things might be a bit unexpected.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 05:01, 18 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=If this is in the format "List of Shikinaisha in X" then I have linked all existing shrines into the table. Otherwise I have not. Translation of the texts will come later as it is a lot less difficult than the tables. Exception if there is another comment explaining the exception below[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 05:34, 17 March 2025 (UTC)}} '''三河国の式内社一覧'''（みかわのくにのしきないしゃいちらん）は、『[[Engishiki]]』第9巻・第10巻「神名帳上下」（[[延喜式神名帳]]）に記載のある[[神社]]、いわゆる「[[式内社]]」およびその[[論社]]のうち、[[三河国]]に分類されている神社の一覧。 また『延喜式』神名帳の編纂当時に存在したが同帳に記載の無い神社、いわゆる「[[式外社]]」についても付記する。 == Shikinai Shrines (式内社) ==『延喜式』神名帳では、小社26座25社を記載。 {{List of Shikinaisha/Legend}} {| class="wikitable" style="background:#ffffff; font-size:85%" ! Otherwise I have not. Translation of the texts will come later as it is a lot less difficult than the tables. {{afc comment|1=Used substitition to get all the templates into here relatively easily. On enwiki if you want the templates extract them out of this page to make templates, The jawiki system is too hard[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 05:35, 31 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=page target for move is at List of Shikinaisha in Mikawa Province[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:49, 26 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=page target for move is at [[List of Shikinaisha in Mikawa Province]] - [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:48, 26 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=page target for move is at List of Shikinaisha in Mikawa Province[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:48, 26 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=Switching over to deprecating the templates. So things might be a bit unexpected.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 05:01, 18 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=If this is in the format "List of Shikinaisha in X" then I have linked all existing shrines into the table. Otherwise I have not. Translation of the texts will come later as it is a lot less difficult than the tables. Exception if there is another comment explaining the exception below[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 05:34, 17 March 2025 (UTC)}} '''三河国の式内社一覧'''（みかわのくにのしきないしゃいちらん）は、『[[Engishiki]]』第9巻・第10巻「神名帳上下」（[[延喜式神名帳]]）に記載のある[[神社]]、いわゆる「[[式内社]]」およびその[[論社]]のうち、[[三河国]]に分類されている神社の一覧。 また『延喜式』神名帳の編纂当時に存在したが同帳に記載の無い神社、いわゆる「[[式外社]]」についても付記する。 == Shikinai Shrines (式内社) ==『延喜式』神名帳では、小社26座25社を記載。 {{List of Shikinaisha/Legend}} {| class="wikitable" style="background:#ffffff; font-size:85%" ! {{afc comment|1=Used substitition to get all the templates into here relatively easily. On enwiki if you want the templates extract them out of this page to make templates, The jawiki system is too hard[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 05:35, 31 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=page target for move is at List of Shikinaisha in Mikawa Province[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:49, 26 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=page target for move is at [[List of Shikinaisha in Mikawa Province]] - [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:48, 26 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=page target for move is at List of Shikinaisha in Mikawa Province[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:48, 26 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=Switching over to deprecating the templates. So things might be a bit unexpected.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 05:01, 18 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=If this is in the format "List of Shikinaisha in X" then I have linked all existing shrines into the table. Otherwise I have not. Translation of the texts will come later as it is a lot less difficult than the tables. Exception if there is another comment explaining the exception below[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 05:34, 17 March 2025 (UTC)}} '''三河国の式内社一覧'''（みかわのくにのしきないしゃいちらん）は、『[[Engishiki]]』第9巻・第10巻「神名帳上下」（[[延喜式神名帳]]）に記載のある[[神社]]、いわゆる「[[式内社]]」およびその[[論社]]のうち、[[三河国]]に分類されている神社の一覧。 また『延喜式』神名帳の編纂当時に存在したが同帳に記載の無い神社、いわゆる「[[式外社]]」についても付記する。 == Shikinai Shrines (式内社) == 『延喜式』神名帳では、小社26座25社を記載。 {{List of Shikinaisha/Legend}} {| class="wikitable" style="background:#ffffff; font-size:85%" ! {{afc comment|1=Used substitition to get all the templates into here relatively easily. On enwiki if you want the templates extract them out of this page to make templates, The jawiki system is too hard[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 05:35, 31 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=page target for move is at List of Shikinaisha in Mikawa Province[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:49, 26 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=page target for move is at [[List of Shikinaisha in Mikawa Province]] - [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:48, 26 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=page target for move is at List of Shikinaisha in Mikawa Province[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:48, 26 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=Switching over to deprecating the templates. Otherwise I have not. Translation of the texts will come later as it is a lot less difficult than the tables. revision.text:
'''三河国の式内社一覧'''（みかわのくにのしきないしゃいちらん）は、『[[延喜式]]』第9巻・第10巻「神名帳上下」（[[延喜式神名帳]]）に記載のある[[神社]]、いわゆる「[[式内社]]」およびその[[論社]]のうち、[[三河国]]に分類されている神社の一覧。 また『延喜式』神名帳の編纂当時に存在したが同帳に記載の無い神社、いわゆる「[[式外社]]」についても付記する。 == 式内社 == {{節stub}} 『延喜式』神名帳では、小社26座25社を記載。 {{式内社一覧/凡例}} {{式内社一覧/header}} |colspan=8 style="background-color:#ccffcc;"|'''[[加茂郡 (三河国)|賀茂郡]]''' 7座（並小） |- |'''野見神社'''||ノミノ||小||||野見神社||愛知県[[豊田市]]野見山町|||| |- |'''野神社'''||||小||||野神社||愛知県[[豊田市]]野口町水別日面|||| |- |'''兵主神社'''||||小||||兵主神社||愛知県[[豊田市]]荒井町松島|||| |- |'''射穂神社'''||イホノ||小||||射穂神社||愛知県[[豊田市]]保見町北山|||| |- |'''狭投神社'''||サナゲ||小||||[[猿投神社]]||[[愛知県]][[豊田市]]猿投町||三河国三宮{{Sfn|中世諸国一宮制|2000年|p=127}}||[http://21coe.kokugakuin.ac.jp/db/jinja/100401.html] |- |'''広沢神社'''||ヒロサハノ||小||||広沢天神社||愛知県豊田市猿投町小黒見|||| |- |'''灰宝神社'''||ハヒホ||小||||灰宝神社||愛知県豊田市越戸町松葉|||| |- |colspan=8 style="background-color:#ccffcc;"|'''[[額田郡]]''' 2座（並小） |- |'''稲前神社'''||イナサキノ
イナクマ||小||||[[稲前神社]]||愛知県[[岡崎市]][[稲熊町]]|||| |- |'''謁播神社'''||アチハノ
エハタ||小||||[[謁播神社]]||愛知県岡崎市[[東阿知和町]]|||| |- |colspan=8 style="background-color:#ccffcc;"|'''[[碧海郡]]''' 6座（並小） |- |rowspan=2|'''和志取神社'''||rowspan=2|ワシトリノ||rowspan=2|小||rowspan=2| ||[[和志取神社 (岡崎市)|和志取神社]]||愛知県岡崎市西本郷町||||rowspan=2| |- |（論）和志取神社||愛知県[[安城市]]柿碕町|| |- |'''酒人神社'''||サカムトノ||小||||酒人神社||愛知県[[岡崎市]]島坂町酒人木ノ元|||| |- |'''日長神社'''||ヒナカノ||小||||日名神明宮||愛知県[[岡崎市]]日名町|||| |- |'''知立神社'''||チリウノ

（菟足神社）||ウタリノ||小||||[[菟足神社]]||愛知県[[豊川市]]小坂井町|||| |- |'''砥鹿神社'''||トカノ||小||||[[砥鹿神社]]||愛知県豊川市一宮町||三河国[[一宮]]{{Sfn|中世諸国一宮制|2000年|p=124}}||[http://21coe.kokugakuin.ac.jp/db/jinja/100101.html] |- |'''赤日子神社'''||アカヒコノ||小||||[[赤日子神社]]||[[愛知県]][[蒲郡市]]神ノ郷町|||| |- |'''石座神社'''||イハクラノ||小||||[[石座神社]]||[[愛知県]][[新城市]]大宮字狐塚|||| |- |colspan=8 style="background-color:#ccffcc;"|'''[[八名郡]]''' 1座（小） |- |'''石巻神社'''||イシマキノ||小||||[[石巻神社]]||愛知県[[豊橋市]]石巻町|||| |- |colspan=8 style="background-color:#ccffcc;"|'''[[渥美郡]]''' 1座（小） |- |'''阿志神社'''||アシノ||小||||[[阿志神社]]||愛知県[[田原市]]芦町|||| |} == 式外社 == {{節stub}} 『延喜式』神名帳の編纂当時に存在したが、同帳に記載の無い神社。 == 脚注 == {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{reflist}} == 参考文献 == * 皇典講究所・全国神職会校訂[{{NDLDC|1442211/160}} 『延喜式 上巻』]（大岡山書店、昭和4年） - 国立国会図書館デジタルコレクション * [{{NDLDC|1273537/37}} 『延喜式 第2』]（日本古典全集刊行会、昭和4年） - 国立国会図書館デジタルコレクション * {{Cite book|和書|editor=中世諸国一宮制研究会編|author=|year=2000|chapter=|title=中世諸国一宮制の基礎的研究|publisher=岩田書院|isbn=978-4872941708|ref={{Harvid|中世諸国一宮制|2000年}}}} == 外部リンク == * [http://21coe.kokugakuin.ac.jp/db/jinja/jinjastate10.html 参河国 式内社26座] - 國學院大學21世紀COEプログラム「神道・神社史料集成」 {{式内社一覧}} {{DEFAULTSORT:みかわのくにのしきないしやいちらん}} [[Category:三河国の式内社|*]] [[Category:式内社の一覧]]

（菟足神社）||ウタリノ||小||||[[菟足神社]]||愛知県[[豊川市]]小坂井町|||| |- |'''砥鹿神社'''||トカノ||小||||[[砥鹿神社]]||愛知県豊川市一宮町||三河国[[一宮]]{{Sfn|中世諸国一宮制|2000年|p=124}}||[http://21coe.kokugakuin.ac.jp/db/jinja/100101.html] |- |'''赤日子神社'''||アカヒコノ||小||||[[赤日子神社]]||[[愛知県]][[蒲郡市]]神ノ郷町|||| |- |'''石座神社'''||イハクラノ||小||||[[石座神社]]||[[愛知県]][[新城市]]大宮字狐塚|||| |- |colspan=8 style="background-color:#ccffcc;"|'''[[八名郡]]''' 1座（小） |- |'''石巻神社'''||イシマキノ||小||||[[石巻神社]]||愛知県[[豊橋市]]石巻町|||| |- |colspan=8 style="background-color:#ccffcc;"|'''[[渥美郡]]''' 1座（小） |- |'''阿志神社'''||アシノ||小||||[[阿志神社]]||愛知県[[田原市]]芦町|||| |} == 式外社 == {{節stub}} 『延喜式』神名帳の編纂当時に存在したが、同帳に記載の無い神社。 == 脚注 == {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{reflist}} == 参考文献 == * 皇典講究所・全国神職会校訂[{{NDLDC|1442211/160}} 『延喜式 上巻』]（大岡山書店、昭和4年） - 国立国会図書館デジタルコレクション * [{{NDLDC|1273537/37}} 『延喜式 第2』]（日本古典全集刊行会、昭和4年） - 国立国会図書館デジタルコレクション * {{Cite book|和書|editor=中世諸国一宮制研究会編|author=|year=2000|chapter=|title=中世諸国一宮制の基礎的研究|publisher=岩田書院|isbn=978-4872941708|ref={{Harvid|中世諸国一宮制|2000年}}}} == 外部リンク == * [http://21coe.kokugakuin.ac.jp/db/jinja/jinjastate10.html 参河国 式内社26座] - 國學院大學21世紀COEプログラム「神道・神社史料集成」 {{式内社一覧}} {{DEFAULTSORT:みかわのくにのしきないしやいちらん}} [[Category:三河国の式内社|*]] [[Category:式内社の一覧]]

revision.text:
{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q11356190]]} This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Mikawa Province''' or the list of shrines in [[Mikawa Province]] which is present in the {ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}
On this page we will also cover the {ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 延喜式神名帳|comment=enwiki is a redirect} of [[Mikawa Province]] which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the Engishiki list. They are shown in a separate table to avoid confusion.

[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 01:50, 28 June 2025 (UTC)}} This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Mikawa Province''' or the list of shrines in [[Mikawa Province]] which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}
On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 延喜式神名帳|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} of [[Mikawa Province]] which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the Engishiki list. They are shown in a separate table to avoid confusion.
The {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}} counts 26 {{ill|Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} in the province – 26 {{ill|Shikinai Shosha|WD=Q134917287}} and 0 {{ill|Shikinai Taisha|WD=Q134917288}}.
== Shikinaisha (式内社) == {| class="wikitable sortable" ! Prov !! Name !! Kana !! revision.text:
{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q11356190]]
[[:ja:三河国の式内社一覧]]
[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:33, 28 June 2025 (UTC)}} This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Mikawa Province''' or the list of shrines in [[Mikawa Province]] which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}
On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 延喜式神名帳|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} of [[Mikawa Province]] which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the Engishiki list. They are shown in a separate table to avoid confusion.
The {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}} counts 26 {{ill|Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} in the province – 26 {{ill|Shikinai Shosha|WD=Q134917287}} and 0 {{ill|Shikinai Taisha|WD=Q134917288}}.

revision.text:
{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q11356190]]
[[:ja:三河国の式内社一覧]]
[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 04:24, 28 June 2025 (UTC)}} This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Mikawa Province''' or the list of shrines in [[Mikawa Province]] which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}
On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 延喜式神名帳|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} of [[Mikawa Province]] which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the Engishiki list. They are shown in a separate table to avoid confusion.
The {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}} counts 26 {{ill|Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} in the province – 26 {{ill|Shikinai Shosha|WD=Q134917287}} and 0 {{ill|Shikinai Taisha|WD=Q134917288}}.

[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:11, 28 June 2025 (UTC)}} This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Mikawa Province''' or the list of shrines in [[Mikawa Province]] which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}
On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 延喜式神名帳|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} of [[Mikawa Province]] which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the Engishiki list. They are shown in a separate table to avoid confusion.
The {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}} counts 26 {{ill|Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} in the province – 26 {{ill|Shikinai Shosha|WD=Q134917287}} and 0 {{ill|Shikinai Taisha|WD=Q134917288}}.

[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 21:20, 28 June 2025 (UTC)}} This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Mikawa Province''' or the list of shrines in [[Mikawa Province]] which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}

{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q11356190]]
[[:ja:三河国の式内社一覧]]
[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 22:04, 28 June 2025 (UTC)}} This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Mikawa Province''' or the list of shrines in [[Mikawa Province]] which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}
On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 延喜式神名帳|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} of [[Mikawa Province]] which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the Engishiki list. They are shown in a separate table to avoid confusion.
The {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}} counts 26 {{ill|Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} in the province – 26 {{ill|Shikinai Shosha|WD=Q134917287}} and 0 {{ill|Shikinai Taisha|WD=Q134917288}}.

[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 23:53, 28 June 2025 (UTC)}} This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Mikawa Province''' or the list of shrines in [[Mikawa Province]] which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}

[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 01:25, 30 June 2025 (UTC)}} This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Mikawa Province''' or the list of shrines in [[Mikawa Province]] which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}

[[:ja:三河国の式内社一覧]]
[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:22, 3 July 2025 (UTC)}} This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Mikawa Province''' or the list of shrines in [[Mikawa Province]] which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}
On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 延喜式神名帳|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} of [[Mikawa Province]] which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the Engishiki list. They are shown in a separate table to avoid confusion.
The {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}} counts 26 {{ill|Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} in the province – 26 {{ill|Shikinai Shosha|WD=Q134917287}} and 0 {{ill|Shikinai Taisha|WD=Q134917288}}.

[[:ja:三河国の式内社一覧]]
[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:34, 3 July 2025 (UTC)}} This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Mikawa Province''' or the list of shrines in [[Mikawa Province]] which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}
On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 延喜式神名帳|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} of [[Mikawa Province]] which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the Engishiki list. They are shown in a separate table to avoid confusion.
The {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}} counts 26 {{ill|Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} in the province – 26 {{ill|Shikinai Shosha|WD=Q134917287}} and 0 {{ill|Shikinai Taisha|WD=Q134917288}}.

{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q11356190]]
[[:ja:三河国の式内社一覧]]
[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:54, 3 July 2025 (UTC)}} This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Mikawa Province''' or the list of shrines in [[Mikawa Province]] which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}
On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 延喜式神名帳|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} of [[Mikawa Province]] which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the Engishiki list. They are shown in a separate table to avoid confusion.
The {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}} counts 26 {{ill|Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} in the province – 26 {{ill|Shikinai Shosha|WD=Q134917287}} and 0 {{ill|Shikinai Taisha|WD=Q134917288}}.

[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 07:46, 3 July 2025 (UTC)}} This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Mikawa Province''' or the list of shrines in [[Mikawa Province]] which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}
On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 延喜式神名帳|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} of [[Mikawa Province]] which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the Engishiki list. They are shown in a separate table to avoid confusion.
The {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}} counts 26 {{ill|Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} in the province – 26 {{ill|Shikinai Shosha|WD=Q134917287}} and 0 {{ill|Shikinai Taisha|WD=Q134917288}}.

{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q11356190]]
[[:ja:三河国の式内社一覧]]
[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:10, 3 July 2025 (UTC)}} This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Mikawa Province''' or the list of shrines in [[Mikawa Province]] which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}
On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 延喜式神名帳|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} of [[Mikawa Province]] which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the Engishiki list. They are shown in a separate table to avoid confusion.
The {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}} counts 26 {{ill|Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} in the province – 26 {{ill|Shikinai Shosha|WD=Q134917287}} and 0 {{ill|Shikinai Taisha|WD=Q134917288}}.

{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q11356190]]
[[:ja:三河国の式内社一覧]]
[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 17:06, 3 July 2025 (UTC)}} This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Mikawa Province''' or the list of shrines in [[Mikawa Province]] which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}
On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 延喜式神名帳|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} of [[Mikawa Province]] which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the Engishiki list. They are shown in a separate table to avoid confusion.
The {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}} counts 26 {{ill|Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} in the province – 26 {{ill|Shikinai Shosha|WD=Q134917287}} and 0 {{ill|Shikinai Taisha|WD=Q134917288}}.

They are shown in a separate table to avoid confusion.

On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 延喜式神名帳|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} of [[Mikawa Province]] which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the Engishiki list. They are shown in a separate table to avoid confusion.
The {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}} counts 26 {{ill|Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} in the province – 26 {{ill|Shikinai Shosha|WD=Q134917287}} and 0 {{ill|Shikinai Taisha|WD=Q134917288}}.

[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 11:25, 4 July 2025 (UTC)}} This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Mikawa Province''' or the list of shrines in [[Mikawa Province]] which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}
On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 延喜式神名帳|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} of [[Mikawa Province]] which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the Engishiki list. They are shown in a separate table to avoid confusion.
The {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}} counts 26 {{ill|Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} in the province – 26 {{ill|Shikinai Shosha|WD=Q134917287}} and 0 {{ill|Shikinai Taisha|WD=Q134917288}}.

They are shown in a separate table to avoid confusion.
The {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}} counts 26 {{ill|Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} in the province – 26 {{ill|Shikinai Shosha|WD=Q134917287}} and 0 {{ill|Shikinai Taisha|WD=Q134917288}}.

On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 延喜式神名帳|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} of [[Mikawa Province]] which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the Engishiki list. They are shown in a separate table to avoid confusion.
The {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}} counts 26 {{ill|Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} in the province – 26 {{ill|Shikinai Shosha|WD=Q134917287}} and 0 {{ill|Shikinai Taisha|WD=Q134917288}}.

[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 01:31, 5 July 2025 (UTC)}} This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Mikawa Province''' or the list of shrines in [[Mikawa Province]] which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}
On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 延喜式神名帳|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} of [[Mikawa Province]] which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the Engishiki list. They are shown in a separate table to avoid confusion.
The {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}} counts 26 {{ill|Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} in the province – 26 {{ill|Shikinai Shosha|WD=Q134917287}} and 0 {{ill|Shikinai Taisha|WD=Q134917288}}.

The {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}} counts 26 {{ill|Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} in the province – 26 {{ill|Shikinai Shosha|WD=Q134917287}} and 0 {{ill|Shikinai Taisha|WD=Q134917288}}.

[[:ja:三河国の式内社一覧]]
[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 20:51, 5 July 2025 (UTC)}} This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Mikawa Province''' or the list of shrines in [[Mikawa Province]] which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}

They are shown in a separate table to avoid confusion.
The {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}} counts 26 {{ill|Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} in the province – 26 {{ill|Shikinai Shosha|WD=Q134917287}} and 0 {{ill|Shikinai Taisha|WD=Q134917288}}.

[[:ja:三河国の式内社一覧]]
[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:14, 6 July 2025 (UTC)}} This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Mikawa Province''' or the list of shrines in [[Mikawa Province]] which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}
On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 延喜式神名帳|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} of [[Mikawa Province]] which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the Engishiki list. They are shown in a separate table to avoid confusion.
The {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}} counts 26 {{ill|Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} in the province – 26 {{ill|Shikinai Shosha|WD=Q134917287}} and 0 {{ill|Shikinai Taisha|WD=Q134917288}}.

[[:ja:三河国の式内社一覧]]
[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 04:05, 7 July 2025 (UTC)}} This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Mikawa Province''' or the list of shrines in [[Mikawa Province]] which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}
On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 延喜式神名帳|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} of [[Mikawa Province]] which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the Engishiki list. They are shown in a separate table to avoid confusion.
The {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}} counts 26 {{ill|Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} in the province – 26 {{ill|Shikinai Shosha|WD=Q134917287}} and 0 {{ill|Shikinai Taisha|WD=Q134917288}}.

revision.text:
{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q11356190]]
[[:ja:三河国の式内社一覧]]
[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:25, 7 July 2025 (UTC)}} This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Mikawa Province''' or the list of shrines in [[Mikawa Province]] which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}
On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 延喜式神名帳|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} of [[Mikawa Province]] which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the Engishiki list. They are shown in a separate table to avoid confusion.
The {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}} counts 26 {{ill|Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} in the province – 26 {{ill|Shikinai Shosha|WD=Q134917287}} and 0 {{ill|Shikinai Taisha|WD=Q134917288}}.

[[:ja:三河国の式内社一覧]]
[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:30, 7 July 2025 (UTC)}} This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Mikawa Province''' or the list of shrines in [[Mikawa Province]] which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}
On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 延喜式神名帳|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} of [[Mikawa Province]] which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the Engishiki list. They are shown in a separate table to avoid confusion.
The {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}} counts 26 {{ill|Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} in the province – 26 {{ill|Shikinai Shosha|WD=Q134917287}} and 0 {{ill|Shikinai Taisha|WD=Q134917288}}.

revision.text:
{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q11356190]]
[[:ja:三河国の式内社一覧]]
[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:55, 7 July 2025 (UTC)}} This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Mikawa Province''' or the list of shrines in [[Mikawa Province]] which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}
On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 延喜式神名帳|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} of [[Mikawa Province]] which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the Engishiki list. They are shown in a separate table to avoid confusion.
The {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}} counts 26 {{ill|Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} in the province – 26 {{ill|Shikinai Shosha|WD=Q134917287}} and 0 {{ill|Shikinai Taisha|WD=Q134917288}}.

[[:ja:三河国の式内社一覧]]
[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:09, 7 July 2025 (UTC)}} This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Mikawa Province''' or the list of shrines in [[Mikawa Province]] which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}
On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 延喜式神名帳|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} of [[Mikawa Province]] which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the Engishiki list. They are shown in a separate table to avoid confusion.
The {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}} counts 26 {{ill|Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} in the province – 26 {{ill|Shikinai Shosha|WD=Q134917287}} and 0 {{ill|Shikinai Taisha|WD=Q134917288}}.

revision.text:
{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q11356190]]
[[:ja:三河国の式内社一覧]]
[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:33, 7 July 2025 (UTC)}} This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Mikawa Province''' or the list of shrines in [[Mikawa Province]] which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}
On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 延喜式神名帳|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} of [[Mikawa Province]] which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the Engishiki list. They are shown in a separate table to avoid confusion.
The {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}} counts 26 {{ill|Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} in the province – 26 {{ill|Shikinai Shosha|WD=Q134917287}} and 0 {{ill|Shikinai Taisha|WD=Q134917288}}.

[[:ja:三河国の式内社一覧]]
[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 21:53, 7 July 2025 (UTC)}} This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Mikawa Province''' or the list of shrines in [[Mikawa Province]] which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}
On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 延喜式神名帳|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} of [[Mikawa Province]] which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the Engishiki list. They are shown in a separate table to avoid confusion.
The {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}} counts 26 {{ill|Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} in the province – 26 {{ill|Shikinai Shosha|WD=Q134917287}} and 0 {{ill|Shikinai Taisha|WD=Q134917288}}.

{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q11356190]]

[[:ja:三河国の式内社一覧]]

[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:54, 21 November 2025 (UTC)}}
This is a list of Shikinaisha in [[Mikawa Province]]. That is the shrines in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]] in the province.

The Engishiki Jinmyōchō counts 26 Shikinaisha in the province – 26 Shikinai Shosha and 0 Shikinai Taisha.

[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:54, 21 November 2025 (UTC)}}
This is a list of Shikinaisha in [[Mikawa Province]]. That is the shrines in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]] in the province.

The Engishiki Jinmyōchō counts 26 Shikinaisha in the province – 26 Shikinai Shosha and 0 Shikinai Taisha.

[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:54, 21 November 2025 (UTC)}}
This is a list of Shikinaisha in [[Mikawa Province]]. That is the shrines in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]] in the province.

The Engishiki Jinmyōchō counts 26 Shikinaisha in the province – 26 Shikinai Shosha and 0 Shikinai Taisha.

[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:54, 21 November 2025 (UTC)}}
This is a list of Shikinaisha in [[Mikawa Province]]. That is the shrines in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]] in the province.

The Engishiki Jinmyōchō counts 26 Shikinaisha in the province – 26 Shikinai Shosha and 0 Shikinai Taisha.

[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:54, 21 November 2025 (UTC)}}
This is a list of Shikinaisha in [[Mikawa Province]]. That is the shrines in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]] in the province.

The Engishiki Jinmyōchō counts 26 Shikinaisha in the province – 26 Shikinai Shosha and 0 Shikinai Taisha.

[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:54, 21 November 2025 (UTC)}}
This is a list of Shikinaisha in [[Mikawa Province]]. That is the shrines in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]] in the province.

The Engishiki Jinmyōchō counts 26 Shikinaisha in the province – 26 Shikinai Shosha and 0 Shikinai Taisha.

This is a list of Shikinaisha in [[Mikawa Province]]. That is the shrines in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]] in the province.

The Engishiki Jinmyōchō counts 26 Shikinaisha in the province – 26 Shikinai Shosha and 0 Shikinai Taisha.

This is a list of Shikinaisha in [[Mikawa Province]]. That is the shrines in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]] in the province.

The Engishiki Jinmyōchō counts 26 Shikinaisha in the province – 26 Shikinai Shosha and 0 Shikinai Taisha.

This is a list of Shikinaisha in [[Mikawa Province]]. That is the shrines in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]] in the province.

The Engishiki Jinmyōchō counts 26 Shikinaisha in the province – 26 Shikinai Shosha and 0 Shikinai Taisha.

This is a list of Shikinaisha in [[Mikawa Province]]. That is the shrines in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]] in the province.

The Engishiki Jinmyōchō counts 26 Shikinaisha in the province – 26 Shikinai Shosha and 0 Shikinai Taisha.

[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:54, 21 November 2025 (UTC)}}
This is a list of Shikinaisha in [[Mikawa Province]]. That is the shrines in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]] in the province.

The Engishiki Jinmyōchō counts 26 Shikinaisha in the province – 26 Shikinai Shosha and 0 Shikinai Taisha.

[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:54, 21 November 2025 (UTC)}}
This is a list of Shikinaisha in [[Mikawa Province]]. That is the shrines in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]] in the province.

The Engishiki Jinmyōchō counts 26 Shikinaisha in the province – 26 Shikinai Shosha and 0 Shikinai Taisha.

This is a list of Shikinaisha in [[Mikawa Province]]. That is the shrines in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]] in the province.

The Engishiki Jinmyōchō counts 26 Shikinaisha in the province – 26 Shikinai Shosha and 0 Shikinai Taisha.

This is a list of Shikinaisha in [[Mikawa Province]]. That is the shrines in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]] in the province.

The Engishiki Jinmyōchō counts 26 Shikinaisha in the province – 26 Shikinai Shosha and 0 Shikinai Taisha.

This is a list of Shikinaisha in [[Mikawa Province]]. That is the shrines in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]] in the province.

The Engishiki Jinmyōchō counts 26 Shikinaisha in the province – 26 Shikinai Shōsha and 0 Shikinai Taisha.

[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:54, 21 November 2025 (UTC)}}
This is a list of Shikinaisha in [[Mikawa Province]]. That is the shrines in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]] in the province.

The Engishiki Jinmyōchō counts 26 Shikinaisha in the province – 26 Shikinai Shōsha and 0 Shikinai Taisha.

This is a list of Shikinaisha in [[Mikawa Province]]. That is the shrines in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]] in the province.

The Engishiki Jinmyōchō counts 26 Shikinaisha in the province – 26 Shikinai Shōsha and 0 Shikinai Taisha.

This is a list of Shikinaisha in [[Mikawa Province]]. That is the shrines in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]] in the province.

The Engishiki Jinmyōchō counts 26 Shikinaisha in the province – 26 Shikinai Shōsha and 0 Shikinai Taisha.

[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 22:04, 16 February 2026 (UTC)}}
This is a list of Shikinaisha in [[Mikawa Province]]. That is the shrines in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]] in the province.

The Engishiki Jinmyōchō counts 26 Shikinaisha in the province – 26 Shikinai Shosha and 0 Shikinai Taisha.

This is a list of Shikinaisha in [[Mikawa Province]]. That is the shrines in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]] in the province.

The Engishiki Jinmyōchō counts 26 Shikinaisha in the province – 26 Shikinai Shosha and 0 Shikinai Taisha.
